untranslatable_reason: This strategy requires identifying futures curve structure (backwardation vs contango) and computing roll returns, which require multi-leg futures pricing data and term structure analysis. These are not available in the allowed indicator set. The strategy is a cross-sectional futures spread strategy that cannot be expressed using single-instrument price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_AT_DRY_7 is a sophisticated calendar spread/roll return strategy from advanced derivatives trading. It requires: (1) identifying term structure conditions (backwardation/contango), (2) computing forward curve slopes, (3) managing paired long-short positions across different contract months, and (4) tracking roll returns. Standard OHLCV and technical indicators cannot express these multi-leg futures structural concepts. A proper implementation would need a dedicated term structure calculator and multi-contract position manager outside this framework.
